title: Supabase direct DB host resolves IPv6 only — WSL2 cannot reach it. Always use th
rationale: Direct connection silently hangs rather than failing fast. Pooler URL resolves IPv4 and works from WSL2. This applies to any Supabase project.
description: Supabase direct DB host resolves IPv6 only — WSL2 cannot reach it. Always use the Session Pooler URL (aws-0-region.pooler.supabase.com:5432) for local dev on WSL2
decision_reason: Category: other. Impact: 8/10. Defer until higher-priority signals processed.
